svg.text: From LLM tool call to OS process, all three platforms

g.text: Segment parse, deny list, chain check

svg.text: PTY: openpty on unix, error on windows. Docker: namespace isolation. WASM: fuel-metered.
Direct mode: piped I/O + ring buffer. Tmux mode: detached + capture-pane polling.
Silence watchdog: timer-reset per output chunk. Kill tree: DFS recursive SIGTERM/SIGKILL.
O(1) timeout, DFS process tree kill, EWMA output estimation, structured concurrency
10 critical gaps for cross-platform CLI mastery
Existing: 8-stage pipeline, 4 isolation levels, PTY/Docker/WASM, seccomp per tool category
Gap theme: Linux is production-ready, macOS is functional, Windows is stubbed
